steps.title: Identify what contrasting requires
steps.content: The goal is to “contrast” the two samples—meaning to highlight what's different between them, not what's similar.

steps.title: Select the choice that shows a specific difference
steps.content:
Choice D states that the SEBS sample was thicker than the TPU sample (4mm vs 3mm), using relevant data from the notes to establish a concrete distinction.

The other choices either emphasize similarity (both temperatures increased, both were studied) or provide only general background unrelated to comparing these specific samples.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
